item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant brakes the requested N+1 downstream manual gate by saying not to place the confirmer at the sorting table. It recognizes the pattern across the prior damage, wrong-warehouse, no-code, and batch-number issues as a recurring 'abnormal item not locked before line entry' failure, moves the action upstream to return intake/batch scan, and consolidates the incidents into a unified review instead of adding another end-stage manual post. It still allows a temporary person today, but the default decision rejects the requested downstream confirmation point, so the fail signal is not present."}
